tripOverview.intro: London offers an enchanting blend of historic charm and modern sophistication perfect for romantic getaways. From world-class museums to cozy pubs and vibrant markets, the city provides endless opportunities for couples to explore together.
tripOverview.vibe: Your London adventure combines iconic sights with intimate moments, perfect for couples seeking romance with a dash of urban exploration.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers mild weather with blooming flowers and fewer crowds than summer months.

attractions.name: Tower of London
attractions.desc: Historic fortress housing the Crown Jewels and centuries of royal history.

attractions.name: British Museum
attractions.desc: World-renowned museum featuring artifacts from ancient civilizations worldwide.

attractions.name: Westminster Abbey
attractions.desc: Gothic abbey where British monarchs have been crowned for nearly 1000 years.

destinationOverview.transportation: London's extensive public transport network includes the Underground (Tube), buses, and trains connecting all major attractions efficiently. Licensed black cabs are iconic but pricier, while Uber and Bolt offer convenient ride-sharing options. An Oyster Card or contactless payment provides the most economical way to travel across zones.
destinationOverview.tip: Download Citymapper for real-time transport updates and always stand right on escalators to let others pass on the left.
destinationOverview.safety: London is generally very safe with low crime rates, though standard precautions should be taken in crowded tourist areas.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans that activate instantly upon arrival in London.

days.intro: Begin your romantic London adventure exploring iconic landmarks and historic treasures.

morning.name: Tower of London
morning.desc: Discover the Crown Jewels and hear tales of royal intrigue.

morning.name: Tower Bridge Exhibition
morning.desc: Walk across the glass floor and enjoy panoramic city views.

afternoon.name: Thames River Walk
afternoon.desc: Stroll hand-in-hand along the South Bank with stunning river views.

afternoon.name: Tate Modern
afternoon.desc: Explore contemporary art in this former power station.

evening.name: Covent Garden
evening.desc: Browse boutiques and watch street performers in this vibrant quarter.

evening.name: West End Show
evening.desc: Catch a romantic musical in London's famous theater district.

days.tip: Book theater tickets in advance for better seats and prices, and always check for last-minute deals at the TKTS booth.

days.intro: Immerse yourselves in London's vibrant market culture and diverse neighborhoods.

morning.name: Borough Market
morning.desc: Sample artisanal foods and local delicacies at London's oldest food market.

morning.name: Southwark Cathedral
morning.desc: Visit this beautiful Gothic cathedral near the market.

afternoon.name: Camden Market
afternoon.desc: Browse vintage finds and alternative fashion in this eclectic market.

afternoon.name: Regent's Park
afternoon.desc: Enjoy a romantic picnic in one of London's most beautiful parks.

evening.name: British Museum
evening.desc: Explore world treasures including the Rosetta Stone and Egyptian mummies.

evening.name: Soho Evening
evening.desc: Experience London's LGBTQ+ heart with vibrant bars and restaurants.

days.tip: Borough Market is busiest on weekends, so arrive early for the best selection and to avoid crowds.

days.intro: End your trip with peaceful gardens, romantic walks, and memorable experiences.

morning.name: Kew Gardens
morning.desc: Wander through stunning botanical gardens and iconic glasshouses.

morning.name: Kew Palace
morning.desc: Tour the smallest of the royal palaces in a beautiful garden setting.

afternoon.name: Richmond Park
afternoon.desc: Spot deer and enjoy panoramic views of London from this vast park.

afternoon.name: Hampton Court Palace
afternoon.desc: Explore Henry VIII's magnificent palace and famous maze.

evening.name: Thames Dinner Cruise
evening.desc: Enjoy a romantic dinner while cruising past illuminated landmarks.

evening.name: London Eye
evening.desc: Take a sunset ride on the iconic observation wheel.

days.tip: Book the Thames dinner cruise for sunset timing to see London's landmarks beautifully illuminated as evening falls.

food.intro: London's diverse culinary scene offers everything from traditional British fare to innovative international cuisine.
food.tip: Most restaurants include service charge, but additional tipping of 10-15% is appreciated for exceptional service.

neighborhoods.name: Covent Garden
neighborhoods.desc: Central location with theaters, shops, and restaurants

neighborhoods.name: South Bank
neighborhoods.desc: River views and cultural attractions nearby
neighborhoods.whyStay: Close to Tate Modern and Borough Market

neighborhoods.name: Soho
neighborhoods.desc: Vibrant nightlife and LGBTQ+ friendly area

hotels.tip: Book accommodations in Zone 1 or 2 for easy access to attractions and efficient public transport connections.

getYourGuide.name: London Eye Fast-Track Tickets
getYourGuide.desc: Skip the lines for London's famous observation wheel with stunning city views.

getYourGuide.name: Borough Market Food Walking Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Guided tasting experience through London's most famous food market with local expert.

getYourGuide.name: Thames Dinner Cruise with Live Music
getYourGuide.desc: Romantic evening cruise featuring three-course dinner and live entertainment with city skyline views.

hiddenGems.name: Little Venice
hiddenGems.desc: Peaceful canal walks with charming houseboats and waterside cafes perfect for couples.

hiddenGems.name: Dennis Severs' House
hiddenGems.desc: Immersive historical experience in a perfectly preserved 18th-century silk weaver's home.

hiddenGems.name: God's Own Junkyard
hiddenGems.desc: Neon wonderland gallery showcasing vintage signs and electric art in a magical warehouse setting.

packing.title: April in London
packing.intro: Pack layers for mild spring weather with occasional rain showers and cool evenings.
packing.luggage: A medium suitcase plus carry-on should suffice for your 3-day romantic getaway.
packing.tip: London's weather can change quickly, so pack versatile layers you can easily add or remove throughout the day.

bookTrip.intro: Round-trip flights from Philadelphia to London typically cost $600-800 per person in April.
